content: I will change the corner rounding of the success modal that pops up after vacancy publication to 5px (`rounded-[5px]`).

args.Description: "Change success modal rounded corners to 5px in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Change the success modal wrapper from rounded-[2.5rem] to rounded-[5px] in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.toolAction: "Changing success modal corners to 5px in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
